function.message: Reviewed the requested bill: the canonical purchase record matches Hörnbach Österreich, dated 2026-01-03 for EUR 32. I cannot pay it by bank transfer or confirm completion from this sandbox, so I did not modify any files or clear the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and inbox workflow, treated the inbox note as a request, verified the bill against the canonical finance record, and stopped without mutation because the requested financial action is unsupported.
function.outcome_justification: 00_inbox/132_next-task.md requests reviewing and paying a bill. The canonical record in 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_03__eur_000032__bill__repair_ledger_faucet_parts.md confirms the bill details. However, the sandbox exposes only local filesystem operations and has no banking or payment-transfer capability, so executing or confirming a bank transfer is unsupported. Per 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md, blocked requests should stop without mutating the workspace.
